approved_command_preview:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemaFiles = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$rows = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach ($f in @($s.fields)) { if ($f.type -in @('singleLineText','multilineText','richText','email','url','phoneNumber')) { $n = [string]$f.name; $role = 'general_text'; if ($n -match '(?i)(summary|detail|notes|rationale|reason|context|description|evidence|source|basis|locator|command|method|criteria|impact|behavior|statement|guidance|prompt|rule|boundary|constraint)') { $role = 'semantic_operational_text' } elseif ($n -match '(?i)(id|key|name|title|path|locator)') { $role = 'identifier_or_locator_text' }; [pscustomobject]@{ table_id=$s.id; table_name=$s.name; field_id=$f.id; field_name=$n; field_type=$f.type; inferred_role=$role; is_primary=($f.id -eq $s.primaryFieldId) } } } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_free_text_inventory_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$rows | Sort-Object table_name, field_name | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'free_text_fields.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 free-text field inventory','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable schema export.','','| table | field | type | inferred role | primary |','|---|---|---|---|---|') + ($rows | Sort-Object table_name, field_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.table_name + ' | ' + $_.field_name + ' | ' + $_.field_type + ' | ' + $_.inferred_role + ' | ' + $_.is_primary + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'free_text_fields.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 free-text field inventory at ' + $outDir)
command:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemaFiles = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$rows = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach ($f in @($s.fields)) { if ($f.type -in @('singleLineText','multilineText','richText','email','url','phoneNumber')) { $n = [string]$f.name; $role = 'general_text'; if ($n -match '(?i)(summary|detail|notes|rationale|reason|context|description|evidence|source|basis|locator|command|method|criteria|impact|behavior|statement|guidance|prompt|rule|boundary|constraint)') { $role = 'semantic_operational_text' } elseif ($n -match '(?i)(id|key|name|title|path|locator)') { $role = 'identifier_or_locator_text' }; [pscustomobject]@{ table_id=$s.id; table_name=$s.name; field_id=$f.id; field_name=$n; field_type=$f.type; inferred_role=$role; is_primary=($f.id -eq $s.primaryFieldId) } } } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_free_text_inventory_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$rows | Sort-Object table_name, field_name | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'free_text_fields.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 free-text field inventory','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable schema export.','','| table | field | type | inferred role | primary |','|---|---|---|---|---|') + ($rows | Sort-Object table_name, field_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.table_name + ' | ' + $_.field_name + ' | ' + $_.field_type + ' | ' + $_.inferred_role + ' | ' + $_.is_primary + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'free_text_fields.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 free-text field inventory at ' + $outDir)
